title: CloudEvent
description: CloudEvents v1.0 envelope with Gluendo platform-mandatory attributes. See ADR-007.

id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID recommended). Used for deduplication.

source.description: URN identifying the producing system. Format: urn:{org}:{domain}:{product}[:{component}]

time.description: Timestamp of when the event occurred (ISO 8601 / RFC 3339)

datacontenttype.description: MIME type of the data field. Always application/json on this platform.

dataschema.description: Resolvable URL to the JSON Schema for the data field

traceparent.description: W3C Trace Context traceparent header for distributed tracing

subject.description: Optional subject of the event in context of the source (e.g., entity ID)

correlationid.description: Trace a business transaction across multiple events

causationid.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event

changedfields.description: JSON Path notation for fields that changed (delta/skinny events). See ADR-008.

etag.description: Entity tag per RFC 7232 for optimistic concurrency (delta/skinny events)

data.description: Event payload. Must conform to the schema referenced by dataschema.
